So no param mismatch. The inconsistency implies differing numerical outputs — likely due to non-identical random input tensors. To semantically match triu(diagonal=k), we set num_lower=-1 (keep all lower triangle) and num_upper=k (keep k superdiagonals including main), but for default diagonal=0, use num_lower=-1, num_upper=0.

To match paddle.triu(diagonal=-1), TensorFlow should use num_lower=0 and num_upper=-1 to keep upper triangle including first subdiagonal. tf.linalg.band_part requires two mandatory arguments 'num_lower' and 'num_upper' to define the band, while paddle.triu only needs 'diagonal'.
